description_long: This object consists of two distinct apartment buildings placed on green bases, with a small detached rectangular structure nearby. The larger building features a modern design with multiple stories, large glass windows, and green balcony railings, as well as a rooftop area that appears to include a terrace or communal space. The smaller building has a more traditional rectangular form, a dark gabled roof, and regularly spaced windows on each floor. Both buildings are surrounded by neatly trimmed grass, suggesting landscaped grounds. The windows are symmetrically arranged, and the facades are primarily white with contrasting dark and green elements. The overall appearance is clean and contemporary, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: Two apartment buildings, one modern with green balconies and rooftop terrace, and one traditional with a dark gabled roof, both set on landscaped green bases.
description_view_0: Front view showing both buildings side by side, highlighting the modern building's green balconies and the traditional building's dark roof.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the depth of the modern building, rooftop terrace, and the relative positioning of the smaller detached structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facades and window arrangements of both buildings, with the green bases clearly visible.
description_view_3: Top-down oblique view showing the roof details of both buildings and the spatial relationship between all three structures.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical and horizontal rows, with consistent spacing and alignment across all visible facades.
